articles.title: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to September 15, 2013
articles.excerpt: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to September 15, 2013; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 November 01, 2014, EB-3 August 15, 2014. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.
articles.what_this_means: March 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to September 15, 2013; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 November 01, 2014, EB-3 August 15, 2014. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

articles.title: Australia Cricket Crisis: IPL Money Luring Players Away in 2026
articles.what_this_means: Australia's captain warns that IPL and franchise cricket are tempting players with sums Cricket Australia can't match—risking an exodus that weakens Test cricket and international competition. For Indian cricket fans in the US, this means potentially weaker opponents for India, reshaping the global cricket landscape as financial power shifts from national boards to T20 leagues.

articles.title: India Cricket 2026-27: Zimbabwe Tour Returns After 24 Years
articles.what_this_means: Zimbabwe cricket returns to India for the first bilateral tour since 2002 during an action-packed 2026-27 season. Bengaluru is hosting matches, offering convenient US viewing times for NRI fans tracking every India cricket score.

articles.title: Toaster: Rajkummar Rao Netflix Dark Comedy April 15, 2026
articles.what_this_means: Toaster, a dark comedy starring Rajkummar Rao and Sanya Malhotra, drops on Netflix April 15, 2026. This quirky Netflix India original turns a wedding gift into an instrument of chaos. Streaming in the US now requires only a Netflix subscription—perfect for NRIs seeking experimental Indian cinema beyond traditional Bollywood.

articles.title: Australia's Molineux Shines Beyond Bowling in West Indies Tour 2026
articles.what_this_means: Australia's coaching staff has discovered that Josh Molineux offers massive value beyond his bowling statistics—his captaincy and leadership potential during the West Indies tour have impressed ahead of the T20 World Cup 2026. As India cricket scores dominate headlines and the India vs Australia rivalry intensifies, Australia's focus on developing smarter leaders (not just skilled bowlers) could be the edge they need in upcoming tournaments.

articles.title: Project Hail Mary IMAX Screens India 2025: What Happened?
articles.what_this_means: Project Hail Mary secured only 6 of India's 34 IMAX screens due to competition from Dhurandhar The Revenge's blockbuster success. The film will likely stream on Netflix, Prime Video, or Disney+ Hotstar within 60 days of theatrical release. US-based Indian diaspora audiences can expect high-quality sci-fi content even if it skips premium formats.
